LocaleLayout.title: Apartment System
LocaleLayout.description: Apartment management for building teams and residents.

NotFoundPage.title: Page not found
NotFoundPage.body: The link may be wrong or the page was removed.

HomePage.heading: Property management, beautifully simple.
HomePage.intro: A refined experience for building teams and residents — manage properties, leases, and maintenance in one place.

ProfilePage.title: Profile
ProfilePage.subtitle: Your account details and building information.
ProfilePage.homeUnknown: No primary unit on file yet. Ask the office to link your unit.
ProfilePage.forbidden: This page is for residents. Open the admin account page instead.
ProfilePage.loadError: Could not load your profile. Please try again.

PropertiesPage.title: Properties
PropertiesPage.subtitle: Buildings or sites you manage. Labels for units must be unique within each property.
PropertiesPage.listError: Could not load properties. Please try again.
PropertiesPage.imageHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF up to 5 MB.

PropertyDetailPage.editSubtitle: Update name and address. Manage units from the Units section.
PropertyDetailPage.unitsCount: {count, plural, one {# unit} other {# units}} at this property
PropertyDetailPage.fetchErrorBody: Something went wrong. If you were signed out, sign in again.
PropertyDetailPage.imageHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF up to 5 MB.

UnitsPage.title: Units
UnitsPage.subtitle: Browse units by property. Open a unit to edit rates, or add a new unit on a separate page.
UnitsPage.editSubtitle: Configure listing and period rates for this unit.
UnitsPage.addUnitHint: Choose a property, then set label, status, and optional rates.
UnitsPage.periodPricesHint: Enable only the lease lengths this unit supports, then enter each price. Disabled rows are not shown to residents. One currency applies to all enabled rows.
UnitsPage.foldPeriodSectionHint: Expand to choose bookable periods and set prices.
UnitsPage.noPublishedRatesMeta: No listing or period rates yet
UnitsPage.imageHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF up to 5 MB. If empty, the property photo or a placeholder is shown.
UnitsPage.occupancySubtitle: Who is staying in this unit by day, from lease start and end dates.
UnitsPage.occupancyLoadError: Could not load leases for this unit.
UnitsPage.occupancyEmpty: No leases on record for this unit yet.
UnitsPage.fetchErrorBody: Something went wrong. If you were signed out, sign in again.

ResidentsPage.title: Residents
ResidentsPage.subtitle: People records; open a resident to see where they stayed over time.

ResidentDetailPage.fetchErrorBody: Something went wrong. If you were signed out, sign in again.
ResidentDetailPage.noCurrentStay: Not staying in any unit right now (no active lease).
ResidentDetailPage.primaryUnitOnly: Primary unit on file (no active lease):
ResidentDetailPage.calendarSubtitle: Which unit this resident was in each day, based on lease start and end dates.
ResidentDetailPage.calendarLoadError: Could not load leases for this resident.

LeasesPage.title: Leases
LeasesPage.subtitle: Contracts for a unit. Only one active lease per unit is allowed; activating sets the unit to occupied.
LeasesPage.addHint: Use resident ObjectIds from the list below, comma-separated for co-tenants.

MaintenancePage.title: Maintenance
MaintenancePage.subtitle: Unit-linked requests (MVP slice from the product feature list).

Auth.loginSubtitle: Staff and residents use the same login. Choose email and password or Google.
Auth.registerSubtitle: Use the email you share with the building. If it is already linked, sign in instead.
Auth.googleError: Google sign-in failed. Try again or use email and password.

MyPortal.title: Resident portal
MyPortal.homeUnknown: No primary unit on file yet. Ask the office to link your unit.
MyPortal.noActiveLease: No active lease on file. Billing and maintenance requests need an active lease.
MyPortal.summaryRentLink: Browse vacant units to rent online
MyPortal.forbiddenHint: This area is for residents. If you are staff, open the admin console instead.
MyPortal.loadError: Could not load data. Check that you are signed in, then try again.
MyPortal.loadError404Resident: Your account is linked to a resident id that has no row in the `residents` collection (common if users were edited in MongoDB without creating the matching resident). Fix: insert a resident document whose `_id` matches your user’s `residentId` field, or re-run resident registration. An admin can also create the resident via the API.
MyPortal.maintenanceSubtitle: Submit requests for units on your active lease.
MyPortal.maintenanceNoUnit: You need an active lease with a unit before you can submit maintenance requests.

rentBook.title: Rent a unit
rentBook.subtitle: Vacant units with published rates can be booked online; your lease becomes active when you confirm. Offer amounts are monthly rent; the first month is debited from your wallet when you book (top up first if needed). Dates use calendar days only (time is ignored).
rentBook.empty: No units are available for online rent right now. Contact the office when a room opens up.
rentBook.loadError: Could not load available units. Check that you are signed in, then try again.
rentBook.loadError404Hint: This page is not available right now. Please try again later or contact your building office.
rentBook.loadError403Hint: You may be signed in with a non-resident account, or your session has no resident profile.
rentBook.dateHint: Only the calendar day matters; use a date (not a time).
rentBook.endHint: Leave blank for open-ended. If set, end date must be after the start date.
rentBook.bookInsufficientWallet: Your wallet balance is not enough for the first month of rent. Add funds from My account (wallet), then try again.

MyPortal.walletSubtitle: Your balance in THB (satang). Top-ups are simulated credits for this MVP.
MyPortal.walletSignInHint: Sign in to view your wallet.
MyPortal.walletMinorHint: Amounts are stored in satang (1 THB = 100 satang). Transfers require the recipient’s user ObjectId from their profile.
MyPortal.walletTopUpHint: Choose TrueMoney Wallet or PromptPay, enter an amount in THB, then generate a demo QR. Confirming applies simulated credit to your wallet (not a real payment).
MyPortal.walletQrModalHint: This QR encodes a mock payload for development only. Confirm when you are ready to credit your wallet in the app.
MyPortal.walletQrGenerateError: Could not generate QR. Try again.
MyPortal.walletTransferHint: Send THB to another registered user. They must give you their user id (same as yours on this page).
